title: geranium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum
intro: Geranium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum, also known as sticky mouse-ear or sticky stork's-bill, is a perennial herb belonging to the geranium family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Geranium cicutarium var. chaerophyllum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, and are typically used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
